TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Filip_Vujanovińá, title = Filip_Vujanovińá, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Filip_Vujanovińá} }

S.FORM: I 1954 a miheca saka 9 folad saka 1 a romi'ad masofoc ci Filip Vujanovińá , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Montenegro anini i ci Filip Vujanovińá, patirengan a romi'ad i 2003 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 22 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i fi…ĺip b~vo~u~ujano~ub~vi* , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u mo~unt…ôn…ô*ro~u anini i ¶i fi…ĺip b~vo~u~ujano~ub~vi*, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1954 a miheca saka 9 folad saka 1 a romi'ad masofoc ci Filip Vujanovińá , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Montenegro anini i ci Filip Vujanovińá, patirengan a romi'ad i 2003 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 22 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i fi…ĺip b~vo~u~ujano~ub~vi* , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u mo~unt…ôn…ô*ro~u anini i ¶i fi…ĺip b~vo~u~ujano~ub~vi*, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
